Oracle Events
OE #1: Search Airtable for Suki Patel's relocation records using airtable_search_records (field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Suki Patel"). Results include Andre Washington (Detroit -> Atlanta, Mosaic Robotics, completed), Jordan Ekwueme (San Diego -> Boston, BrightLoop, completed), and several other In Progress records from the base universe (Daniel Reeves and Maya Johansson for Vectral Systems, Andre Mitchell for Mosaic Robotics) that also show Suki as coordinator in Airtable. The key discovery is that Rachel Dominguez, Sasha Greenwald, and Jordan Whitfield are NOT found under Suki -- they are listed under Javier Morales instead, contradicting the March capacity update and all email evidence.
OE #2: Search Slack for March capacity update using conversations_search_messages (query: "capacity update" or "Suki"). Find March 23 message from Chloe Vance listing Suki Patel on Rachel Dominguez (Canopy Health), Sasha Greenwald (PivotPoint Labs), Jordan Whitfield (BrightLoop) -- contradicts Airtable coordinator assignments.
OE #3: Search Linear for Suki's tickets using linear_list_issues (assignee: Suki Patel). Find existing tickets for Andre Washington (apartment, flight, movers) and Jordan Ekwueme (apartment, flight, movers). Confirm Rachel Dominguez, Sasha Greenwald, and Jordan Whitfield have NO Linear tickets -- these are the active moves missing from the system.
OE #4: Search emails for Rachel Dominguez using search_emails (query: "Rachel Dominguez"). Find Catalina's status email confirming "Assigned Coordinator: Suki Patel", origin Los Angeles, destination Portland, August 15 timeline.
OE #5: Search emails for Sasha Greenwald using search_emails (query: "Sasha Greenwald"). Find Catalina's status email confirming "Coordinator: Suki Patel", origin New York, destination Nashville, August 25 timeline.
OE #6: Search emails for Jordan Whitfield using search_emails (query: "Jordan Whitfield"). Find Mina's status email confirming "Coordinator: Suki Patel", origin Minneapolis, destination Denver, August 22 timeline. Jordan Whitfield is a different person from Jordan Ekwueme (San Diego -> Boston, April 2026).
OE #7: Search emails for Jordan Ekwueme temp housing using search_emails (query: "The Hive Cambridge" or "temp housing"). Find Suki's email to Jordan with temp housing details: The Hive Cambridge in Kendall Square, April 22-25, 4 nights at $195/night ($780 total), tentatively held -- no formal ops approval documented.
OE #8: Search Slack for temp housing mentions using conversations_search_messages (query: "temp housing" or "Hive" or "Ekwueme"). Find Suki's March 3 post in #operations mentioning BrightLoop Ekwueme relocation needs temporary housing at The Hive in Kendall Square. No formal approval thread found.
OE #9: Search emails for Deshawn Hartley using search_emails (query: "Deshawn Hartley" or "Automate 2026"). Find Emeka's email and Chloe's coordinator assignment confirming Deshawn Hartley (Tampa -> Denver, Mosaic Robotics) assigned to Suki Patel with hard April 19 delivery deadline for Automate 2026 trade show. NOT in Linear.
OE #10: Look up Suki Patel using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Suki"). Find suki.patel@moveops.com.
OE #11: Look up Chloe Vance using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Chloe"). Find chloe.vance@moveops.com.
OE #12: Update Rachel Dominguez's Airtable relocation record using airtable_update_records to change Assigned Coordinator from "Javier Morales" to "Suki Patel".
OE #13: Update Sasha Greenwald's Airtable relocation record using airtable_update_records to change Assigned Coordinator from "Javier Morales" to "Suki Patel".
OE #14: Update Jordan Whitfield's Airtable relocation record using airtable_update_records to change Assigned Coordinator from "Javier Morales" to "Suki Patel".
OE #15: Update Jordan Ekwueme's existing Airtable relocation record using airtable_update_records to document the temp housing commitment (The Hive Cambridge, April 22-25, 4 nights, $780, tentatively held, pending formal ops approval).
OE #16: Create Linear ticket for Rachel Dominguez using linear_create_issue (title: "Rachel Dominguez Relocation - Canopy Health, Los Angeles to Portland", assignee: Suki Patel).
OE #17: Create Linear ticket for Sasha Greenwald using linear_create_issue (title: "Sasha Greenwald Relocation - PivotPoint Labs, New York to Nashville", assignee: Suki Patel).
OE #18: Create Linear ticket for Jordan Whitfield using linear_create_issue (title: "Jordan Whitfield Relocation - BrightLoop Analytics, Minneapolis to Denver", assignee: Suki Patel).
OE #19: Create Linear ticket for Deshawn Hartley using linear_create_issue (title: "URGENT - Deshawn Hartley Relocation TPA to DEN, Hard Deadline April 19", description: Automate 2026 trade show, pickup April 15-16, Swift Relocations, zero flexibility, priority: urgent, assignee: Suki Patel).
OE #20: Post to #operations using conversations_add_message alerting Chloe: (a) Rachel Dominguez, Sasha Greenwald, Jordan Whitfield had wrong coordinator in Airtable (Javier Morales instead of Suki Patel) -- corrected; (b) Linear tickets created for Rachel, Sasha, Jordan Whitfield; (c) Jordan Whitfield and Jordan Ekwueme are two different people at BrightLoop -- different origins, destinations, and timelines; (d) Deshawn Hartley urgent ticket created -- hard deadline April 19; (e) Jordan Ekwueme housing hold at The Hive Cambridge ($780, April 22-25) documented in Airtable -- needs formal ops approval.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
